welcome.description: Professional beauty treatments delivered to your room. Select your services and book your perfect moment.
welcome.luxuryDescription: High-end wellness excellence, in the privacy of your room. Our expert therapists come to your suite.

confirmation.subtitle: Thank you for your trust.

venue.workspaceServiceDescription: High-end wellness excellence, at your workspace. Our expert therapists come to you.
venue.enterpriseServiceDescription: Treat yourself to a real moment of disconnection. Our expert therapists set up directly in your offices — no commute, no stress, just care.
venue.inEnterpriseDisclaimer: Our team comes directly to your offices.
